arxiv_papers.title: How adaptation to food resources and death rates shape oscillatory dynamics in a microbial population
arxiv_papers.snippet: Microbes constantly interact with their environment by depleting and transforming food sources. Theoretical studies have mainly focused on Lotka-Volterra models, which do not account for food source dynamics. arxiv_papers.snippet: Additional food sources for an introduced predator are known to increase its efficiency on a target pest. This represents about 8.2% 2% of the global population, down from 8.5% in 2023 and 8.7% in 2022. While this good news is welcome, progress around the globe has been unequal. Progress has been made in Southern Asia, Southeastern Asia, and South America. Hunger increased in Africa. More than 20% of the population faced hunger in 20% of the population faced hunger in 2024.
